subject: Fermi  trigger No 644449593: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210603.91 (trigger No 644449593,09h 43m 31.20s , -62d 07m 12.0s, R=9.84) errorbox  5893 sec after notice time and 5923 sec after trigger time at 2021-06-03 23:25:11 UT, with upper limit up to  18.2 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 38 deg. The sun  altitude  is -22.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -7 deg., longitude l = 283 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1627784

We obtain a following upper limits.
